subject: Re: Plan C, LLC
body:
plan d. or classic air


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, March 26, 2007 2:59:30 PM
Subject: Plan C, LLC


Plan C, LLC is not available as the name of the purchaser of the Sikorsky.  
 
Do you have any other names?  I would prefer at least two:  One with additional wording at the end of Plan C to distinguish it from an already existing Plan C, LLC (e.g., Plan C Air Transportation, LLC);  and one completely different.   
 
Please advise.
 
Thanks.
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com
 
------------------------------
